The match for third place was played on 17 December. The two teams had played against each other in their opening game in Group F which finished 0–0. Joško Gvardiol promptly scored for Croatia, with Achraf Dari equalising just 2 minutes later. Mislav Oršić scored the winner for Croatia as the match finished 2–1. Morocco earned 4th place, a record for the team and the best World Cup finish of any African or Arab nation.
| Croatia | 2–1 | Morocco |
 --- 
|  Gvardiol  7'  Oršić  42' |  |  Dari  9' |

Referee: Abdulrahman Al-Jassim (Qatar)
### Final
Main article: 2022 FIFA World Cup final

Welcome. That is the World Cup. This is the Lusail Stadium. And this is the final of the 2022 FIFA World Cup. It is here and it is now that we establish which of Argentina and France will become for the third time in either case the champions of the world. Match 64. The final. Pick tall for Messi. And spread adroitly by Messi for Di Maria. And Di Maria can loft it in. Not cleared by Rabiot. Taken up by De Paul. Messi. De Paul. Scooped up towards Alvarez. And he was offside. It's gone a little too early. They held the line well, France there. Mc Allister. Fernandez. Picked by Griezmann. Won back for Alvarez. Now Angel Di Maria. Di Maria's cut back has reached Rodrigo De Paul. De Paul strikes. The deflection from Varane flies wide. They've been sharper in all areas of the pitch in these

subtasks.task: Compile the information about the winner and key moments of the match
subtasks.result: [stub] Tool not implemented for hint: none

final_answer:
The winner of the 2022 FIFA World Cup final match is Argentina. They defeated France 4-2 in a penalty shoot-out after the match ended 3-3 after extra time. The match was played on December 18, 2022, at the Lusail Stadium in Lusail, Qatar. 

Key moments of the match include Gonzalo Montiel's match-winning penalty kick in the penalty shoot-out and Lionel Messi being named the Man of the Match. France forward Kylian Mbappé also became the second player in history to score a hat-trick in a World Cup final.
